summary: Iteration 2: verified media upload, Wompi paywall (checkout signature, webhook, paid GET), config endpoint, removed 'Made with Emergent' badge, and Sofía/Nombre y apellidos placeholders. All 10 pytest backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified end-to-end including photo upload+persistence+remove, redirect to checkout.wompi.co with correct params, webhook-driven paid unlock, and /i/{id} rendering with inv-photo-grid.
action_items: iteration_1 test file (/app/backend/tests/backend_test.py) has one test (TestUpdate.test_update_valid_token) that now fails because GET /api/invitations/{id} of an unpaid invitation returns 402 (correct new behavior). Update or split that test if regression suite is re-run.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/media/{path:path} serves any stored media without checking whether the parent invitation is paid; a user with a media path can access photos even before payment (data-exposure risk if paths are guessable, though UUIDs mitigate).
Public /api/invitations/{id} returns 402 with error detail 'Esta invitación aún no ha sido publicada' — front-end InvitationPage handles this via invitation-unpublished testid (verified).

Webhook uses timestamp+events_secret concatenation but does not validate timestamp freshness — replay attacks with a captured valid payload possible. Consider rejecting timestamps older than N minutes.
init_storage caches storage_key globally without expiration; if key expires, all media requests fail until backend restarts.
test_credentials: No auth in app. Wompi PRODUCTION keys in /app/backend/.env — real payments not executed. Events secret used to sign a fake webhook and mark test invitation 71bff68a-fe6b-47a4-87e7-be7a2aea475a as paid.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_ invitations during backend tests. Marked frontend test invitation 71bff68a-fe6b-47a4-87e7-be7a2aea475a as paid via webhook simulation. Uploaded 2 test JPEGs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://invite-designer-31.preview.emergentagent.com. Wompi PROD keys in /app/backend/.env. Do NOT execute real Wompi payments. To simulate payment: (1) call POST /api/invitations/{id}/checkout?token=... to get wompi_reference, (2) POST /api/wompi/webhook with signature.properties=['transaction.id','transaction.status','transaction.amount_in_cents'] and checksum=sha256(txid+status+amount+timestamp+WOMPI_EVENTS_SECRET). Amount must equal 5500000 and currency=COP. Old iteration_1 backend_test.py has an update test that now fails because unpaid GET returns 402 — expected new behavior.
